response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq. He demonstrates strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks), cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and polyglot breadth. Gaps are mostly around specific stack items (Nest.js, Kotlin, Vitest/Playwright not explicitly listed) and a current career gap, none of which are disqualifying for an experienced generalist.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience with production systems at scale
Hands-on AI-agent development and MCP tooling experience, a rare explicit JD requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, authored testing libraries, workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience; Java exposure appears dated
Vitest/Playwright/Jest not specifically mentioned despite strong general testing background
Currently in a career gap since October 2025, so ramp-up recency should be probed
